title: Adversarial findings store
goal: Add a dedicated .mini/findings/ store and a 'mini findings add' command that mini owns (path + format, with an origin phase and an open/resolved status), then point the adversarial prompt at it: the reviewer records each finding by calling 'mini findings add' instead of editing the old phase's run report, and is explicitly instructed to only report — never modify or fix source code. Consuming the store in next/plan/do is a follow-up phase.

steps.title: Findings store module + tests
steps.detail: src/state/findingsStore.ts: FINDINGS_DIR (.mini/findings/), findingsPath via phaseStem, Finding type (id, severity blocker|should-know|nit, status open|resolved, where?, title/body). Parse/serialize a per-phase file with MULTIPLE entries; each entry header line '## <id> · <severity> · <status>' (status flippable on one line by a later resolve) + body. addFinding computes the next sequential id (155-1, 155-2), appends, returns {id, path}. listFindings({includeResolved}) scans the dir. Covered by findingsStore.test.ts: round-trip, id assignment, missing dir → empty, malformed entries ignored.

steps.title: mini findings add command
steps.detail: src/commands/findings.ts findingsAdd: mini infers the origin phase (current, else last done — same selection as buildAdversarialContext), calls addFinding, prints a confirmation (assigned id + path) so a failed call is visible not silent. Args: --severity (validated against the three values), --title, optional --where file:line, --body. Guards: no project / no phase → error. Wire into cli.ts + completion. Covered by a test.

steps.title: mini findings list command
steps.detail: Read-only: default = open findings across ALL phases (origin id + id + severity + where + title); --all includes resolved. Empty/missing store → 'no open findings', never errors. Wire into cli.ts + help + completion. Covered by a test.

steps.title: Rewire adversarial prompt to store
steps.detail: Simplify buildAdversarialSessionPrompt (sessionContext.ts) and buildAdversarialContext (adversarialContext.ts): remove the valid/corrupt/missing report-write branching and the memoryWrite block; KEEP reading reportBody as reviewer context. Prompt now instructs: record each finding via 'mini findings add ...', report only — never edit or fix source code. Update the prompt snapshot.

steps.title: Tighten adversarial tool scope
steps.detail: adversarial.ts ADVERSARIAL_ALLOWED_TOOLS: drop Edit, add Bash(mini findings add:*). Update adversarial.test.ts to assert the new set (Edit gone, findings grant present) reaches workWithClaude.

steps.title: Findings versioned + command docs
steps.detail: Ensure the skeleton .gitignore does NOT exclude .mini/findings/ (unlike .mini/run/). Add mini findings to docs/ (per-command docs precedent). No /mini:findings slash command (out of scope).

resolvedVerify: A real `mini adversarial` session records findings via `mini findings add`
